full_name: Metallic materials — Tensile testing — Part 1: Method of test at room temperature
scope_summary: Defines the room-temperature tensile test method for metallic materials in any product form and the mechanical properties (e.g. yield strength, tensile strength, elongation) determined from it. Third edition; tests performed at 23 +/- 5 degrees C.

full_name: Metallic materials — Charpy pendulum impact test — Part 1: Test method
scope_summary: Specifies the Charpy V-notch and U-notch pendulum impact test for measuring the energy absorbed when a notched specimen is broken by a single pendulum blow. Excludes instrumented impact testing (covered by ISO 14556). Third edition.

full_name: Metallic materials — Brinell hardness test — Part 1: Test method
scope_summary: Specifies the Brinell hardness test method for metallic materials using a hard-metal ball indenter (1, 2.5, 5 or 10 mm) forced into the surface; hardness is derived from the diameter of the residual indentation. Applies to fixed and portable machines.

full_name: Metallic materials — Vickers hardness test — Part 1: Test method
scope_summary: Specifies the Vickers hardness test method across three test-force ranges for metallic materials, hard metals, and metallic and inorganic coatings, for indentation diagonals between 0.020 mm and 1.400 mm. Fifth edition.

full_name: Metallic materials — Rockwell hardness test — Part 1: Test method
scope_summary: Specifies the Rockwell regular and superficial hardness test method for scales A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, K, 15N, 30N, 45N, 15T, 30T and 45T for metallic materials, applicable to stationary and portable machines. Fifth edition.

full_name: Metallic materials — Conversion of hardness values
scope_summary: Provides the principles and tables for converting hardness values between scales and estimating tensile strength, for unalloyed/low-alloy and cast steels, quenched and tempered steels, cold-working steels, high-speed and tool steels, hardmetals, and non-ferrous alloys. Converted values are indicative only.

full_name: Heat-treatable steels, alloy steels and free-cutting steels — Part 1: Non-alloy steels for quenching and tempering
scope_summary: Specifies technical delivery requirements for non-alloy steels for quenching and tempering, supplied as semi-finished products, bars, wire rod, flat products and forgings, intended for quenched-and-tempered or austempered and surface-hardened machine parts. Part of the ISO 683 series maintained by ISO/TC 17.

full_name: Heat-treatable steels, alloy steels and free-cutting steels — Part 2: Alloy steels for quenching and tempering
scope_summary: Specifies technical delivery requirements for alloy steels for quenching and tempering, supplied as semi-finished products, hot-formed bars, wire rod, finished flat products and forgings. Part of the ISO 683 series maintained by ISO/TC 17.

full_name: Fasteners — Mechanical properties of corrosion-resistant stainless steel fasteners — Part 1: Bolts, screws and studs with specified grades and property classes
scope_summary: Specifies mechanical and physical properties and property classes for bolts, screws and studs (coarse and fine pitch) made of austenitic, martensitic, ferritic and duplex corrosion-resistant stainless steels, tested at ambient temperature.

full_name: Steel for the reinforcement and prestressing of concrete — Test methods — Part 1: Reinforcing bars, rods and wire
scope_summary: Specifies mechanical, chemical and geometrical test methods for reinforcing bars, rods and wire used in concrete reinforcement, consolidating the relevant test procedures for reinforcing steels. Maintained by ISO/TC 17/SC 16.

full_name: Structural steels — Part 1: General technical delivery conditions for hot-rolled products
scope_summary: Specifies general technical delivery conditions for hot-rolled structural steel flat and long products (plates, wide flats, sections, bars) intended for welded or bolted structures. Excludes sheet/strip and tubular products.

full_name: Spheroidal graphite cast irons — Classification
scope_summary: Defines grades and requirements for spheroidal (nodular) graphite cast irons, classified by mechanical properties measured on machined test pieces, covering ferritic-to-pearlitic and solid-solution-strengthened ferritic grades. Maintained by ISO/TC 25.

full_name: Wrought aluminium and aluminium alloys — Chemical composition
scope_summary: Specifies the chemical composition limits of wrought products and ingots intended to be wrought in aluminium and aluminium alloys, together with the designations for their chemical composition. Supersedes the 2007 edition.

full_name: Steel flat products for pressure purposes — Technical delivery conditions — Part 1: General requirements
scope_summary: Specifies general technical delivery conditions for steel flat products (plate, sheet and strip) used mainly in the construction of pressure equipment; the general requirements of ISO 404 also apply. Part 1 of a multi-part series covering specific steel types.

full_name: Implants for surgery — Metallic materials — Part 3: Wrought titanium 6-aluminium 4-vanadium alloy
scope_summary: Specifies the characteristics and corresponding test methods for wrought Ti-6Al-4V titanium alloy used in the manufacture of surgical implants, including chemical composition and mechanical property requirements.

full_name: Non-alloy steel wire rod for conversion to wire — Part 1: General requirements
scope_summary: Specifies general requirements for non-alloy steel wire rod intended for wire drawing and/or cold rolling, of various cross-sections generally at least 5 mm in nominal dimension with a smooth surface. Part 1 of a four-part series.

full_name: Steels for cold heading and cold extruding
scope_summary: Specifies requirements for non-alloy and alloy steels intended for cold heading or cold extruding, delivered as wire rod, wire or bars, primarily addressing the properties of parts subjected to subsequent heat treatment. Later split into Part 1 (non-alloy/alloy) and Part 2 (stainless).

full_name: Hot dip galvanized coatings on fabricated iron and steel articles — Specifications and test methods
scope_summary: Specifies the general properties of, and test methods for, hot dip galvanized zinc coatings applied by dipping fabricated iron and steel articles (including certain castings) in a zinc melt containing not more than 2 % of other metals. Excludes continuously galvanized sheet, wire and mesh and tube galvanized in automatic plants.

full_name: Metallic materials — Tensile testing — Part 2: Method of test at elevated temperature
scope_summary: Specifies the method of tensile testing of metallic materials at temperatures above room temperature (above 35 degrees C) and the properties determined, such as proof strength, tensile strength, elongation and reduction of area. Replaced the former ISO 783. Maintained by ISO/TC 164/SC 1.

full_name: Stainless steels — Chemical composition
scope_summary: Lists the chemical compositions of stainless steels agreed by ISO/TC 17/SC 4, compiled mainly from existing ISO, ASTM, EN, JIS and GB specifications, and applies to all wrought product forms including ingots and semi-finished material. Second edition.

full_name: Steel and steel products — Location and preparation of samples and test pieces for mechanical testing
scope_summary: Specifies requirements for the identification, location and preparation of samples and test pieces for mechanical tests on steel sections, bars, rod, flat products and tubular products as defined in ISO 6929. Third edition, confirmed 2022.

full_name: Steel and steel products — General technical delivery requirements
scope_summary: Specifies the general technical delivery requirements for all steel products covered by ISO 6929, with the exception of steel castings and powder-metallurgical products, including requirements for inspection documents and testing. Third edition; Amendment 1 published 2022.

full_name: Steel products — Vocabulary
scope_summary: Defines terms for steel products classified according to their stage of manufacture, shape and dimensions, and appearance, covering liquid steel, ingots, semi-finished products, flat products and long products. Second edition, replacing ISO 6929:1987.

full_name: Preparation of steel substrates before application of paints and related products — Visual assessment of surface cleanliness — Part 1: Rust grades and preparation grades of uncoated steel substrates and of steel substrates after overall removal of previous coatings
scope_summary: Identifies four rust grades of mill scale and rust on uncoated steel and defines preparation grades of visual cleanliness achieved by blast-cleaning, hand and power tool cleaning and flame cleaning, described in words with representative photographic examples. Maintained by ISO/TC 35/SC 12.

full_name: Wrought aluminium and aluminium alloys — Sheets, strips and plates — Part 2: Mechanical properties
scope_summary: Specifies the mechanical properties (tensile strength, 0.2 % proof stress, elongation) of wrought aluminium and aluminium alloy sheets, strips and plates for general engineering applications. Part of the multi-part ISO 6361 series maintained by ISO/TC 79.

full_name: Hot-rolled steel bars — Part 4: Tolerances
scope_summary: Specifies the dimensional tolerances applicable to hot-rolled steel bars supplied in straight lengths as round, square, hexagonal, octagonal and flat bars. Part 4 of the ISO 1035 series (Parts 1-3 give dimensions of round, square and flat bars); the series is being consolidated by ISO/FDIS 1035.

full_name: Copper and copper alloys — Code of designation — Part 1: Designation of materials
scope_summary: Establishes the system for designating coppers and copper alloys by material composition, using the prefix ISO with international chemical symbols for the base and major alloying elements followed by letters or numbers indicating grade or nominal alloy content. Maintained by ISO/TC 26.

full_name: Copper refinery shapes
scope_summary: Specifies the requirements for refined copper in the form of refinery shapes (unwrought products), including cathodes, horizontally, vertically and continuously cast wire bars, cakes, billets and ingots. Maintained by ISO/TC 26.

full_name: Implants for surgery — Metallic materials — Part 2: Unalloyed titanium
scope_summary: Specifies the characteristics and corresponding test methods for wrought unalloyed titanium used in the manufacture of surgical implants, listing several grades based on tensile strength together with chemical composition requirements. Maintained by ISO/TC 150/SC 1.

full_name: Stainless steels for springs — Part 1: Wire
scope_summary: Specifies the grades of stainless steel generally used in the cold-drawn condition as wire of circular cross-section up to 10.00 mm diameter for the production of springs and spring parts exposed to corrosion and sometimes slightly elevated temperatures. Maintained by ISO/TC 17/SC 4.

full_name: Determination of resistance to intergranular corrosion of stainless steels — Part 2: Ferritic, austenitic and ferritic-austenitic (duplex) stainless steels — Corrosion test in media containing sulfuric acid
scope_summary: Specifies test methods for determining the resistance to intergranular corrosion of ferritic, austenitic and duplex stainless steels in sulfuric-acid media, including the 16 % H2SO4/copper sulfate (Monypenny Strauss) test, the 35 % H2SO4/copper sulfate test and the 40 % H2SO4/ferric sulfate test. Confirmed 2021.

full_name: Metallic and other inorganic coatings — Electroplated coatings of zinc with supplementary treatments on iron or steel
scope_summary: Specifies requirements for electroplated zinc coatings with supplementary treatments (e.g. chromate conversion coatings) on iron or steel, including a designation system, information to be supplied by the purchaser, and heat-treatment requirements before and after plating. Maintained by ISO/TC 107.

full_name: Steel — Determination of content of non-metallic inclusions — Micrographic method using standard diagrams
scope_summary: Specifies a micrographic method, using standard reference diagrams, for determining the non-metallic inclusion content of rolled or forged steel products with a reduction ratio of at least 3, and also provides for determination by image analysis. Maintained by ISO/TC 17/SC 7.

full_name: Heat-treatable steels, alloy steels and free-cutting steels — Part 17: Ball and roller bearing steels
scope_summary: Specifies technical delivery requirements for five groups of wrought ball and roller bearing steels: through-hardening, case-hardening, induction-hardening (unalloyed and alloyed), stainless and high-temperature bearing steels. Part of the ISO 683 series maintained by ISO/TC 17.

full_name: Wrought aluminium and aluminium alloys — Extruded rods/bars, tubes and profiles — Part 2: Mechanical properties
scope_summary: Specifies the mechanical properties (tensile strength, 0.2 % proof stress and elongation) of wrought aluminium and aluminium alloy extruded rods/bars, tubes and profiles for general engineering applications, tabulated by alloy, temper and product form. Maintained by ISO/TC 79/SC 6.

full_name: Ferrous materials — Heat treatments — Vocabulary
scope_summary: Defines the terms used in the heat treatment of ferrous materials (products and workpieces of steel and cast iron), with an alphabetical list of terms and equivalents in French, German, Chinese and Japanese, and a table of iron-carbon phases. Maintained by ISO/TC 17/SC 7.
